details.test: Task 1: Instant quote for 6 white uPVC casement windows under £3,000 and submit enquiry
Task 2: Add cheapest white uPVC double-glazed casement window with multi-point locking to quote basket
Task 3: Compare two casement windows under £400 and save the higher energy rating style to quote
Task 4: Book home consultation for windows and doors (first Saturday next month, 10:00–12:00)
Task 5: Choose finance plan for £3,000 with monthly payments under £90 and start application
Task 6: Check service coverage for XY12 4ZZ and request callback 18:00–19:00
Task 7: Filter for recent 4+ star Birmingham windows reviews and open details
Task 8: Submit aftercare request for condensation between panes (June 2022, 3 windows)
Task 9: Use a 15%+ windows offer for 8 windows and submit enquiry with promo code
